channel.title: Appointory - Clinic Management Updates
channel.description: Real-time clinic management and digital health locker platform updates

item.title: Appointory Launched - AI-Powered Clinic Management Platform
item.description: Introducing Appointory - A comprehensive platform for clinic management with real-time queue tracking, digital health records, and AI-powered scheduling
item.content:encoded: Appointory is now live! Experience seamless clinic operations with: - Real-time queue management with Socket.io - Digital health locker for secure patient records - OTP-secured patient access - Lab referral integration - Role-based dashboards - AI wait-time prediction - WhatsApp notifications - Multi-role staff management

item.title: Key Features - Digital Health Locker
item.description: Secure your medical records with Appointory's digital health locker

item.title: Clinic Dashboard - Real-time Operations
item.description: Manage your clinic with real-time insights and patient queue management
